title: Operate in a motor sport environment
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate in a motor sport environment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine potential career path in motor sport and develop individual goals

pcs.text: Identify structure of motor sport sector1.2 Assess personal skills to identify strengths and weaknesses1.3 Research and determine motor sport team expectations 1.4 Set goals to achieve personal expectations1.5 Research and match potential career paths with personal goals1.6 Identify and incorporate training needs into career planning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify structure of motor sport sector1.2 Assess personal skills to identify strengths and weaknesses1.3 Research and determine motor sport team expectations 1.4 Set goals to achieve personal expectations1.5 Research and match potential career paths with personal goals1.6 Identify and incorporate training needs into career planning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify structure of motor sport sector1.2 Assess personal skills to identify strengths and weaknesses1.3 Research and determine motor sport team expectations 1.4 Set goals to achieve personal expectations1.5 Research and match potential career paths with personal goals1.6 Identify and incorporate training needs into career planning.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine potential career path in motor sport and develop individual goals

elements.title: Meet motor sport team employment requirements

pcs.text: Identify team organisational structure2.2 Comply with obligations to employers and others 2.3 Observe regulatory and safety requirements throughout work2.4 Identify and comply with team lines of communication and authority 2.5 Identify and comply with applicable legislation, regulations, codes of practice and team expectations, policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify team organisational structure2.2 Comply with obligations to employers and others 2.3 Observe regulatory and safety requirements throughout work2.4 Identify and comply with team lines of communication and authority 2.5 Identify and comply with applicable legislation, regulations, codes of practice and team expectations, policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify team organisational structure2.2 Comply with obligations to employers and others 2.3 Observe regulatory and safety requirements throughout work2.4 Identify and comply with team lines of communication and authority 2.5 Identify and comply with applicable legislation, regulations, codes of practice and team expectations, policies and procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Meet motor sport team employment requirements

elements.title: Manage daily work activities in motor sport environment

pcs.text: Use required lines of communication with supervisors, peers and external persons3.2 Identify, prioritise and complete individual tasks within designated timeframes and according to team standards and work schedule3.3 Monitor and adjust own work according to feedback obtained from supervisors3.4 Seek assistance from required persons when difficulties arise in achieving allocated tasks3.5 Make changes to workload or work priorities when unforeseen circumstances or developments occur3.6 Maintain well organised and safe personal workspace according to team and workplace standards3.7 Identify and report potentially discriminating or hazardous practices and policies to team persons
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use required lines of communication with supervisors, peers and external persons3.2 Identify, prioritise and complete individual tasks within designated timeframes and according to team standards and work schedule3.3 Monitor and adjust own work according to feedback obtained from supervisors3.4 Seek assistance from required persons when difficulties arise in achieving allocated tasks3.5 Make changes to workload or work priorities when unforeseen circumstances or developments occur3.6 Maintain well organised and safe personal workspace according to team and workplace standards3.7 Identify and report potentially discriminating or hazardous practices and policies to team persons?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Manage daily work activities in motor sport environment

elements.title: Contribute to productive team environment

pcs.text: Share information and knowledge with team members to ensure designated work goals are met4.2 Identify and prioritise personal work objectives according to team requirements4.3 Receive, encourage and act upon constructive feedback from other team members 4.4 Detect variations from team standards in quality of components or work practices and report to team members according to team procedures4.5 Seek assistance actively from, or provide to, other team members when difficulties arise4.6 Use communication techniques to gather and understand instructions4.7 Identify signs of interpersonal conflict and act constructively upon or refer to a supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Share information and knowledge with team members to ensure designated work goals are met4.2 Identify and prioritise personal work objectives according to team requirements4.3 Receive, encourage and act upon constructive feedback from other team members 4.4 Detect variations from team standards in quality of components or work practices and report to team members according to team procedures4.5 Seek assistance actively from, or provide to, other team members when difficulties arise4.6 Use communication techniques to gather and understand instructions4.7 Identify signs of interpersonal conflict and act constructively upon or refer to a supervisor?

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
